prevalence.value: 10-20% annual incidence in children (episodes; mostly viral)
prevalence.source: European primary care respiratory infection syntheses

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical assessment; Centor/McIsaac and rapid antigen tests used in many systems; antibiotics reserved for likely/confirmed GAS

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High symptom resolution; stewardship reduces unnecessary antibiotics

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Rapid antigen testing and culture commonly available for uncertain cases
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Supportive care for viral; penicillin/amoxicillin for GAS; emphasis on antimicrobial stewardship
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong primary care access and guideline-driven stewardship programs
